name: agricultural_policy_municipal_bond_lumen_tru_loy
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: agricultural policy municipal bond lumen tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A whistleblower tip has reached a reporter; silence reads as cover-up, while a rushed statement reads as recklessness. Telemetry and logs are diverging; the SOC lead will freeze writes in twelve minutes if no accountable owner signs off. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Zara Reed
agents.identity: I am Zara Reed, the accountable decision-maker on this Agricultural Policy bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Zara Patel
agents.identity: I am Zara Patel, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Zara Reed must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Zara Reed do?
